>>> 0;\n  if (off >= MEM_SIZE) return;\n  memBuf[off] = val & 0xff;\n}\n\n// Write string to memory\nfunction writeStr(addr, str) {\n  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) w8(addr + i, str.charCodeAt(i));\n  w8(addr + str.length, 0);\n}\n\n// Read null-terminated string from memory\nfunction readStr(addr) {\n  let s = '';\n  for (let i = 0; i < 4096; i++) {\n    const c = ru8(addr + i);\n    if (c === 0) break;\n    s += String.fromCharCode(c);\n  }\n  return s;\n}\n\n// Load ELF\nfunction loadELF(filePath) {\n  const data = fs.readFileSync(filePath);\n  // Verify ELF magic\n  if (data[0] !== 0x7f || data[1] !== 0x45) throw new Error('Not an ELF file');\n  const entry = data.readUInt32LE(24);\n  const phoff = data.readUInt32LE(28);\n  const phnum = data.readUInt16LE(44);\n  const phentsize = data.readUInt16LE(42);\n\n  for (let i = 0; i < phnum; i++) {\n    const off = phoff + i * phentsize;\n    const type = data.readUInt32LE(off);\n    if (type !== 1) continue; // PT_LOAD\n    const p_offset = data.readUInt32LE(off + 4);\n    const p_vaddr = data.readUInt32LE(off + 8);\n    const p_filesz = data.readUInt32LE(off + 16);\n    const p_memsz = data.readUInt32LE(off + 20);\n\n    // Copy file data\n    const dstOff = (p_vaddr - MEM_BASE) >>> 0;\n    if (dstOff + p_filesz <= MEM_SIZE) {\n      data.copy(memBuf, dstOff, p_offset, p_offset + p_filesz);\n    }\n    // BSS (p_memsz > p_filesz) is already zeroed\n  }\n  return entry;\n}\n\n// File descriptor table for syscalls\nconst fdTable = new Map();\nlet nextFd = 10;\n\n// In-memory file storage\nconst fileStore = new Map(); // path -> {data: Buffer, pos: 0}\n\n// Initialize: load doom.wad into file store\nfunction initFiles() {\n  const wadPath = path.join(__dirname, 'doom.wad');\n  if (fs.existsSync(wadPath)) {\n    fileStore.set('doom.wad', { data: fs.readFileSync(wadPath) });\n    // Also accessible as /doom.wad, ./doom.wad, etc.\n  }\n}\n\nfunction normalizePath(p) {\n  // Strip leading ./ or /\n  p = p.replace(/^\\.\\//g, '').replace(/^\\/+/g, '');\n  return p;\n}\n\n// Syscall numbers (custom, from source)\nconst SYS_READ = 0, SYS_WRITE = 1, SYS_OPEN = 2, SYS_CLOSE = 3;\nconst SYS_LSEEK = 8, SYS_FSYNC = 74, SYS_EXIT = 60;\nconst SYS_RENAME = 82, SYS_MKDIR = 83, SYS_UNLINK = 87;\nconst SYS_TIME = 201;\n\n// Open file flags\nconst O_RDONLY = 0, O_WRONLY = 1, O_RDWR = 2;\nconst O_CREAT = 64, O_TRUNC = 512, O_APPEND = 1024;\n\nfunction handleSyscall(regs) {\n  const num = regs[2]; // $v0\n  const a0 = regs[4], a1 = regs[5], a2 = regs[6], a3 = regs[7];\n\n  switch (num) {\n    case SYS_READ: { // read(fd, buf, count)\n      const fd = a0, bufAddr = a1 >>> 0, count = a2 >>> 0;\n      const entry = fdTable.get(fd);\n      if (!entry) { regs[2] = -9; return; } // EBADF\n      const avail = entry.data.length - entry.pos;\n      const toRead = Math.min(count, avail > 0 ? avail : 0);\n      for (let i = 0; i < toRead; i++) {\n        w8(bufAddr + i, entry.data[entry.pos + i]);\n      }\n      entry.pos += toRead;\n      regs[2] = toRead;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_WRITE: { // write(fd, buf, count)\n      const fd = a0, bufAddr = a1 >>> 0, count = a2 >>> 0;\n      if (fd === 0 || fd === 1 || fd === 2) {\n        // stdout/stderr\n        let s = '';\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) s += String.fromCharCode(ru8(bufAddr + i));\n        process.stdout.write(s);\n        regs[2] = count;\n        return;\n      }\n      const entry = fdTable.get(fd);\n      if (!entry) { regs[2] = -9; return; }\n      // Ensure buffer is large enough\n      const needed = entry.pos + count;\n      if (needed > entry.data.length) {\n        const newBuf = Buffer.alloc(needed);\n        entry.data.copy(newBuf, 0, 0, entry.data.length);\n        entry.data = newBuf;\n      }\n      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n        entry.data[entry.pos + i] = ru8(bufAddr + i);\n      }\n      entry.pos += count;\n      if (entry.pos > entry.size) entry.size = entry.pos;\n      regs[2] = count;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_OPEN: { // open(path, flags, mode)\n      const pathStr = readStr(a0 >>> 0);\n      const flags = a1;\n      const norm = normalizePath(pathStr);\n\n      if (flags & O_CREAT || flags & O_WRONLY || flags & O_RDWR) {\n        // Creating/writing a file\n        const fd = nextFd++;\n        let existing = fileStore.get(norm);\n        if (existing && !(flags & O_TRUNC)) {\n          fdTable.set(fd, { data: Buffer.from(existing.data), pos: (flags & O_APPEND) ? existing.data.length : 0, size: existing.data.length, path: norm, writable: true });\n        } else {\n          fdTable.set(fd, { data: Buffer.alloc(1024 * 1024 * 2), pos: 0, size: 0, path: norm, writable: true });\n        }\n        regs[2] = fd;\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Reading\n      const stored = fileStore.get(norm);\n      if (!stored) {\n        regs[2] = -2; // ENOENT\n        return;\n      }\n      const fd = nextFd++;\n      fdTable.set(fd, { data: stored.data, pos: 0, size: stored.data.length, path: norm, writable: false });\n      regs[2] = fd;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_CLOSE: { // close(fd)\n      const fd = a0;\n      const entry = fdTable.get(fd);\n      if (!entry) { regs[2] = -9; return; }\n      // If writable, save to fileStore and possibly to disk\n      if (entry.writable && entry.size > 0) {\n        const finalData = Buffer.from(entry.data.buffer, entry.data.byteOffset, entry.size);\n        fileStore.set(entry.path, { data: Buffer.from(finalData) });\n        // Save to real filesystem\n        saveToDisk(entry.path, finalData);\n      }\n      fdTable.delete(fd);\n      regs[2] = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_LSEEK: { // lseek(fd, offset, whence)\n      const fd = a0, offset = a1, whence = a2;\n      const entry = fdTable.get(fd);\n      if (!entry) { regs[2] = -9; return; }\n      if (whence === 0) entry.pos = offset; // SEEK_SET\n      else if (whence === 1) entry.pos += offset; // SEEK_CUR\n      else if (whence === 2) entry.pos = entry.size + offset; // SEEK_END\n      if (entry.pos < 0) entry.pos = 0;\n      regs[2] = entry.pos;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_FSYNC: { regs[2] = 0; return; }\n    case SYS_RENAME: {\n      const oldPath = normalizePath(readStr(a0 >>> 0));\n      const newPath = normalizePath(readStr(a1 >>> 0));\n      const d = fileStore.get(oldPath);\n      if (d) { fileStore.set(newPath, d); fileStore.delete(oldPath); }\n      regs[2] = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_MKDIR: { regs[2] = 0; return; }\n    case SYS_UNLINK: {\n      const p = normalizePath(readStr(a0 >>> 0));\n      fileStore.delete(p);\n      regs[2] = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_TIME: { // time(tloc)\n      const t = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);\n      if (a0 !== 0) w32(a0, t);\n      regs[2] = t;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_EXIT: {\n      console.log('DOOM exited with code ' + a0);\n      process.exit(a0);\n    }\n    default: {\n      // Unknown syscall - return 0\n      regs[2] = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfunction saveToDisk(filePath, data) {\n  // Save files written by doom to the real filesystem\n  // Ensure parent directories exist\n  let realPath;\n  if (filePath.startsWith('tmp/')) {\n    realPath = '/' + filePath;\n  } else if (filePath.startsWith('/')) {\n    realPath = filePath;\n  } else {\n    realPath = path.join(__dirname, filePath);\n  }\n  const dir = path.dirname(realPath);\n  try { fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }); } catch(e) {}\n  try { fs.writeFileSync(realPath, data); } catch(e) {\n    // Try in current dir\n    try { fs.writeFileSync(path.join(__dirname, path.basename(filePath)), data); } catch(e2) {}\n  }\n}\n\n// FPU state\nconst fprBuf = new ArrayBuffer(128); // 32 * 4 bytes for 32 FPRs\nconst fprU32 = new Uint32Array(fprBuf);\nconst fprI32 = new Int32Array(fprBuf);\nconst fprF32 = new Float32Array(fprBuf);\nconst fprDV = new DataView(fprBuf);\nlet fcc = 0; // FPU condition code\n\nfunction getFPRdouble(reg) {\n  // Even register: low word, reg+1: high word\n  const lo = fprU32[reg & 0x1e];\n  const hi = fprU32[(reg & 0x1e) | 1];\n  const buf = Buffer.alloc(8);\n  buf.writeUInt32LE(lo, 0);\n  buf.writeUInt32LE(hi, 4);\n  return buf.readDoubleLE(0);\n}\nfunction setFPRdouble(reg, val) {\n  const buf = Buffer.alloc(8);\n  buf.writeDoubleLE(val, 0);\n  fprU32[reg & 0x1e] = buf.readUInt32LE(0);\n  fprU32[(reg & 0x1e) | 1] = buf.readUInt32LE(4);\n}\n\n// Main interpreter\nfunction run() {\n  initFiles();\n  const entry = loadELF(path.join(__dirname, 'doomgeneric_mips'));\n\n  // GPR: 32 registers, treat as signed 32-bit\n  const R = new Int32Array(32);\n  R[29] = STACK_TOP; // SP\n  R[28] = 0x00475000; // GP (approximate)\n\n  let pc = entry;\n  let hi = 0, lo = 0;\n  let delayPC = -1;\n  let steps = 0;\n  const MAX_STEPS = 5000000000;\n\n  while (steps < MAX_STEPS) {\n    const inst = ru32(pc);\n    if (inst === 0) { // NOP\n      if (delayPC !== -1) { pc = delayPC; delayPC = -1; } else { pc = (pc + 4) >>> 0; }\n      steps++;\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    const op = inst >>> 26;\n    let branchTarget = -1;\n\n    switch (op) {\n      case 0x00: { // SPECIAL\n        const funct = inst & 0x3f;\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const rd = (inst >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n        const sa = (inst >>> 6) & 0x1f;\n        switch (funct) {\n          case 0x00: // SLL\n            R[rd] = (R[rt] << sa) | 0; break;\n          case 0x02: // SRL / ROTR\n            if (rs & 1) { // ROTR\n              R[rd] = ((R[rt] >>> sa) | (R[rt] << (32 - sa))) | 0;\n            } else {\n              R[rd] = (R[rt] >>> sa) | 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          case 0x03: // SRA\n            R[rd] = (R[rt] >> sa) | 0; break;\n          case 0x04: // SLLV\n            R[rd] = (R[rt] << (R[rs] & 0x1f)) | 0; break;\n          case 0x06: // SRLV / ROTRV\n            if (sa & 1) { // ROTRV\n              const sh = R[rs] & 0x1f;\n              R[rd] = ((R[rt] >>> sh) | (R[rt] << (32 - sh))) | 0;\n            } else {\n              R[rd] = (R[rt] >>> (R[rs] & 0x1f)) | 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          case 0x07: // SRAV\n            R[rd] = (R[rt] >> (R[rs] & 0x1f)) | 0; break;\n          case 0x08: // JR\n            branchTarget = R[rs] >>> 0; break;\n          case 0x09: // JALR\n            branchTarget = R[rs] >>> 0;\n            R[rd] = (pc + 8) | 0;\n            break;\n          case 0x0a: // MOVZ\n            if (R[rt] === 0) R[rd] = R[rs]; break;\n          case 0x0b: // MOVN\n            if (R[rt] !== 0) R[rd] = R[rs]; break;\n          case 0x0c: // SYSCALL\n            handleSyscall(R);\n            break;\n          case 0x0d: // BREAK\n            break;\n          case 0x10: // MFHI\n            R[rd] = hi | 0; break;\n          case 0x11: // MTHI\n            hi = R[rs]; break;\n          case 0x12: // MFLO\n            R[rd] = lo | 0; break;\n          case 0x13: // MTLO\n            lo = R[rs]; break;\n          case 0x18: { // MULT\n            const a = BigInt(R[rs]);\n            const b = BigInt(R[rt]);\n            const result = a * b;\n            lo = Number(result & 0xFFFFFFFFn) | 0;\n            hi = Number((result >> 32n) & 0xFFFFFFFFn) | 0;\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x19: { // MULTU\n            const a = BigInt(R[rs] >>> 0);\n            const b = BigInt(R[rt] >>> 0);\n            const result = a * b;\n            lo = Number(result & 0xFFFFFFFFn) | 0;\n            hi = Number((result >> 32n) & 0xFFFFFFFFn) | 0;\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x1a: { // DIV\n            if (R[rt] !== 0) {\n              lo = (R[rs] / R[rt]) | 0;\n              hi = (R[rs] % R[rt]) | 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x1b: { // DIVU\n            const a = R[rs] >>> 0, b = R[rt] >>> 0;\n            if (b !== 0) {\n              lo = (a / b) >>> 0;\n              hi = (a % b) >>> 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x20: // ADD\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] + R[rt]) | 0; break;\n          case 0x21: // ADDU\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] + R[rt]) | 0; break;\n          case 0x22: // SUB\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] - R[rt]) | 0; break;\n          case 0x23: // SUBU\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] - R[rt]) | 0; break;\n          case 0x24: // AND\n            R[rd] = R[rs] & R[rt]; break;\n          case 0x25: // OR\n            R[rd] = R[rs] | R[rt]; break;\n          case 0x26: // XOR\n            R[rd] = R[rs] ^ R[rt]; break;\n          case 0x27: // NOR\n            R[rd] = ~(R[rs] | R[rt]); break;\n          case 0x2a: // SLT\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] < R[rt]) ? 1 : 0; break;\n          case 0x2b: // SLTU\n            R[rd] = ((R[rs] >>> 0) < (R[rt] >>> 0)) ? 1 : 0; break;\n          case 0x34: // TEQ\n            // Trap if equal - for divide by zero checks, just ignore\n            break;\n          default:\n            console.error('Unknown SPECIAL funct: 0x' + funct.toString(16) + ' at PC=0x' + pc.toString(16));\n            break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x01: { // REGIMM\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14; // sign-extended, *4\n        switch (rt) {\n          case 0x00: // BLTZ\n            if (R[rs] < 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n            break;\n          case 0x01: // BGEZ\n            if (R[rs] >= 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n            break;\n          case 0x10: // BLTZAL\n            R[31] = (pc + 8) | 0;\n            if (R[rs] < 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n            break;\n          case 0x11: // BGEZAL\n            R[31] = (pc + 8) | 0;\n            if (R[rs] >= 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n            break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x02: // J\n        branchTarget = (((pc + 4) & 0xf0000000) | ((inst & 0x03ffffff) << 2)) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      case 0x03: // JAL\n        R[31] = (pc + 8) | 0;\n        branchTarget = (((pc + 4) & 0xf0000000) | ((inst & 0x03ffffff) << 2)) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      case 0x04: { // BEQ\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14;\n        if (R[rs] === R[rt]) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x05: { // BNE\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14;\n        if (R[rs] !== R[rt]) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x06: { // BLEZ\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14;\n        if (R[rs] <= 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x07: { // BGTZ\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14;\n        if (R[rs] > 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x08: { // ADDI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = (R[rs] + imm) | 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x09: { // ADDIU\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = (R[rs] + imm) | 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0a: { // SLTI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = (R[rs] < imm) ? 1 : 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0b: { // SLTIU\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = ((R[rs] >>> 0) < (imm >>> 0)) ? 1 : 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0c: { // ANDI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = inst & 0xffff;\n        R[rt] = R[rs] & imm;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0d: { // ORI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = inst & 0xffff;\n        R[rt] = R[rs] | imm;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0e: { // XORI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = inst & 0xffff;\n        R[rt] = R[rs] ^ imm;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0f: { // LUI\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = inst & 0xffff;\n        R[rt] = (imm << 16) | 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x1c: { // SPECIAL2\n        const funct = inst & 0x3f;\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const rd = (inst >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n        switch (funct) {\n          case 0x02: // MUL\n            R[rd] = Math.imul(R[rs], R[rt]); break;\n          case 0x20: // CLZ\n            R[rd] = R[rs] === 0 ? 32 : Math.clz32(R[rs] >>> 0); break;\n          case 0x21: // CLO\n            R[rd] = Math.clz32(~R[rs] >>> 0); break;\n          default: break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x1f: { // SPECIAL3\n        const funct = inst & 0x3f;\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const rd = (inst >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n        const sa = (inst >>> 6) & 0x1f;\n        switch (funct) {\n          case 0x00: { // EXT - extract bit field\n            const pos = sa;\n            const size = rd + 1;\n            R[rt] = (R[rs] >>> pos) & ((1 << size) - 1);\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x04: { // INS - insert bit field\n            const pos = sa;\n            const size = rd - pos + 1;\n            const mask = ((1 << size) - 1) << pos;\n            R[rt] = (R[rt] & ~mask) | ((R[rs] << pos) & mask);\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x20: { // BSHFL\n            switch (sa) {\n              case 0x02: // WSBH - word swap bytes within halfwords\n                R[rd] = (((R[rt] & 0xff00ff00) >>> 8) | ((R[rt] & 0x00ff00ff) << 8)) | 0;\n                break;\n              case 0x10: // SEB - sign extend byte\n                R[rd] = (R[rt] << 24) >> 24; break;\n              case 0x18: // SEH - sign extend halfword\n                R[rd] = (R[rt] << 16) >> 16; break;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          default: break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x11: { // COP1 (FPU)\n        const fmt = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const ft = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const fs_ = (inst >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n        const fd = (inst >>> 6) & 0x1f;\n        const cfunct = inst & 0x3f;\n        switch (fmt) {\n          case 0x00: // MFC1\n            R[ft] = fprI32[fs_]; break;\n          case 0x04: // MTC1\n            fprI32[fs_] = R[ft]; break;\n          case 0x03: // MFHC1\n            R[ft] = fprI32[fs_ | 1]; break;\n          case 0x07: // MTHC1\n            fprI32[fs_ | 1] = R[ft]; break;\n          case 0x08: // BC1\n            if (ft & 1) { // BC1T\n              if (fcc) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + ((inst << 16) >> 14)) >>> 0;\n            } else { // BC1F\n              if (!fcc) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + ((inst << 16) >> 14)) >>> 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          case 0x10: { // S (single precision)\n            const a = fprF32[fs_], b = fprF32[ft];\n            switch (cfunct) {\n              case 0x00: fprF32[fd] = a + b; break; // ADD.S\n              case 0x01: fprF32[fd] = a - b; break; // SUB.S\n              case 0x02: fprF32[fd] = a * b; break; // MUL.S\n              case 0x03: fprF32[fd] = a / b; break; // DIV.S\n              case 0x06: fprF32[fd] = a; break; // MOV.S\n              case 0x07: fprF32[fd] = -a; break; // NEG.S\n              case 0x0d: fprI32[fd] = Math.trunc(a); break; // TRUNC.W.S\n              case 0x21: setFPRdouble(fd, a); break; // CVT.D.S\n              case 0x11: if (fcc) fprF32[fd] = fprF32[fs_]; break; // MOVT.S\n              case 0x34: fcc = (a < b) ? 1 : 0; break; // C.OLT.S\n              default: break;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x11: { // D (double precision)\n            const a = getFPRdouble(fs_), b = getFPRdouble(ft);\n            switch (cfunct) {\n              case 0x00: setFPRdouble(fd, a + b); break; // ADD.D\n              case 0x01: setFPRdouble(fd, a - b); break; // SUB.D\n              case 0x02: setFPRdouble(fd, a * b); break; // MUL.D\n              case 0x03: setFPRdouble(fd, a / b); break; // DIV.D\n              case 0x06: setFPRdouble(fd, a); break; // MOV.D\n              case 0x07: setFPRdouble(fd, -a); break; // NEG.D\n              case 0x11: if (fcc) setFPRdouble(fd, getFPRdouble(fs_)); break; // MOVT.D\n              case 0x34: fcc = (a < b) ? 1 : 0; break; // C.OLT.D\n              default: break;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x14: { // W (word - integer in FPR)\n            switch (cfunct) {\n              case 0x20: fprF32[fd] = fprI32[fs_]; break; // CVT.S.W\n              case 0x21: setFPRdouble(fd, fprI32[fs_]); break; // CVT.D.W\n              default: break;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          default: break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x20: { // LB\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = r8((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x21: { // LH\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = r16((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x22: { // LWL\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        const addr = (R[rs] + imm) >>> 0;\n        const aligned = addr & ~3;\n        const byte_ = addr & 3;\n        const mem = ru32(aligned);\n        switch (byte_) {\n          case 0: R[rt] = (R[rt] & 0x00ffffff) | ((mem & 0xff) << 24); break;\n          case 1: R[rt] = (R[rt] & 0x0000ffff) | ((mem & 0xffff) << 16); break;\n          case 2: R[rt] = (R[rt] & 0x000000ff) | ((mem & 0xffffff) << 8); break;\n          case 3: R[rt] = mem; break;\n        }\n        R[rt] = R[rt] | 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x23: { // LW\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = r32((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x24: { // LBU\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = ru8((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x25: { // LHU\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = ru16((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x26: { // LWR\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        const addr = (R[rs] + imm) >>> 0;\n        const aligned = addr & ~3;\n        const byte_ MEM_BASE) >>> 0;\n  for (let i = 0; i < 4096; i++) {\n    const c = memU8[off + i];\n    if (c === 0) break;\n    s += String.fromCharCode(c);\n  }\n  return s;\n}\n\n// Load ELF file into return;\n    }\n    case 1: { // write\n      const fd = a0, ba = (a1 - MEM_BASE) >>> 0, cnt = a2 >>> 0;\n      if (fd <= 2) {\n        process.stdout.write(Buffer.from(memAB, ba, cnt));\n        R[2] memBuf.readUInt16LE(off);\n}\nfunction r8(addr) {\n  const off = (addr - MEM_BASE) >>> 0;\n  if (off >= MEM_SIZE) return 0;\n  return (memBuf[off] << 24) >> 24; // sign extend\n}\nfunction ru8(addr) {\n  const off = (addr - MEM_BASE) >>> 0;\n  if (off >= MEM_SIZE) return 0;\n  return memBuf[off];\n}\nfunction w32(addr, val) {\n  const off = (addr - MEM_BASE) >>> 0;\n  if (off + 3 >= MEM_SIZE) return;\n  memBuf.writeInt32LE(val | 0, off);\n}\nfunction w16(addr, val) {\n  const off = (addr - MEM_BASE) >>> 0;\n  if (off + 1 >= MEM_SIZE) return;\n  memBuf.writeInt16LE(val & 0xffff, off);\n}\nfunction w8(addr, val) {\n  const off = (addr - MEM_BASE) >>> 0;\n  if (off >= MEM_SIZE) return;\n  memBuf[off] = val & 0xff;\n}\n\n// Write string to memory\nfunction writeStr(addr, str) {\n  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) w8(addr + i, str.charCodeAt(i));\n  w8(addr + str.length, 0);\n}\n\n// Read null-terminated string from memory\nfunction readStr(addr) {\n  let s = '';\n  for (let i = 0; i < 4096; i++) {\n    const c = ru8(addr + i);\n    if (c === 0) break;\n    s += String.fromCharCode(c);\n  }\n  return s;\n}\n\n// Load ELF\nfunction loadELF(filePath) {\n  const data = fs.readFileSync(filePath);\n  // Verify ELF magic\n  if (data[0] !== 0x7f || data[1] !== 0x45) throw new Error('Not an ELF file');\n  const entry = data.readUInt32LE(24);\n  const phoff = data.readUInt32LE(28);\n  const phnum = data.readUInt16LE(44);\n  const phentsize = data.readUInt16LE(42);\n\n  for (let i = 0; i < phnum; i++) {\n    const off = phoff + i * phentsize;\n    const type = data.readUInt32LE(off);\n    if (type !== 1) continue; // PT_LOAD\n    const p_offset = data.readUInt32LE(off + 4);\n    const p_vaddr = data.readUInt32LE(off + 8);\n    const p_filesz = data.readUInt32LE(off + 16);\n    const p_memsz = data.readUInt32LE(off + 20);\n\n    // Copy file data\n    const dstOff = (p_vaddr - MEM_BASE) >>> 0;\n    if (dstOff + p_filesz <= MEM_SIZE) {\n      data.copy(memBuf, dstOff, p_offset, p_offset + p_filesz);\n    }\n    // BSS (p_memsz > p_filesz) is already zeroed\n  }\n  return entry;\n}\n\n// File descriptor table for syscalls\nconst fdTable = new Map();\nlet nextFd = 10;\n\n// In-memory file storage\nconst fileStore = new Map(); // path -> {data: Buffer, pos: 0}\n\n// Initialize: load doom.wad into file store\nfunction initFiles() {\n  const wadPath = path.join(__dirname, 'doom.wad');\n  if (fs.existsSync(wadPath)) {\n    fileStore.set('doom.wad', { data: fs.readFileSync(wadPath) });\n    // Also accessible as /doom.wad, ./doom.wad, etc.\n  }\n}\n\nfunction normalizePath(p) {\n  // Strip leading ./ or /\n  p = p.replace(/^\\\\.\\\\//g, '').replace(/^\\\\/+/g, '');\n  return p;\n}\n\n// Syscall numbers (custom, from source)\nconst SYS_READ = 0, SYS_WRITE = 1, SYS_OPEN = 2, SYS_CLOSE = 3;\nconst SYS_LSEEK = 8, SYS_FSYNC = 74, SYS_EXIT = 60;\nconst SYS_RENAME = 82, SYS_MKDIR = 83, SYS_UNLINK = 87;\nconst SYS_TIME = 201;\n\n// Open file flags\nconst O_RDONLY = 0, O_WRONLY = 1, O_RDWR = 2;\nconst O_CREAT = 64, O_TRUNC = 512, O_APPEND = 1024;\n\nfunction handleSyscall(regs) {\n  const num = regs[2]; // $v0\n  const a0 = regs[4], a1 = regs[5], a2 = regs[6], a3 = regs[7];\n\n  switch (num) {\n    case SYS_READ: { // read(fd, buf, count)\n      const fd = a0, bufAddr = a1 >>> 0, count = a2 >>> 0;\n      const entry = fdTable.get(fd);\n      if (!entry) { regs[2] = -9; return; } // EBADF\n      const avail = entry.data.length - entry.pos;\n      const toRead = Math.min(count, avail > 0 ? avail : 0);\n      for (let i = 0; i < toRead; i++) {\n        w8(bufAddr + i, entry.data[entry.pos + i]);\n      }\n      entry.pos += toRead;\n      regs[2] = toRead;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_WRITE: { // write(fd, buf, count)\n      const fd = a0, bufAddr = a1 >>> 0, count = a2 >>> 0;\n      if (fd === 0 || fd === 1 || fd === 2) {\n        // stdout/stderr\n        let s = '';\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) s += String.fromCharCode(ru8(bufAddr + i));\n        process.stdout.write(s);\n        regs[2] = count;\n        return;\n      }\n      const entry = fdTable.get(fd);\n      if (!entry) { regs[2] = -9; return; }\n      // Ensure buffer is large enough\n      const needed = entry.pos + count;\n      if (needed > entry.data.length) {\n        const newBuf = Buffer.alloc(needed);\n        entry.data.copy(newBuf, 0, 0, entry.data.length);\n        entry.data = newBuf;\n      }\n      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n        entry.data[entry.pos + i] = ru8(bufAddr + i);\n      }\n      entry.pos += count;\n      if (entry.pos > entry.size) entry.size = entry.pos;\n      regs[2] = count;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_OPEN: { // open(path, flags, mode)\n      const pathStr = readStr(a0 >>> 0);\n      const flags = a1;\n      const norm = normalizePath(pathStr);\n\n      if (flags & O_CREAT || flags & O_WRONLY || flags & O_RDWR) {\n        // Creating/writing a file\n        const fd = nextFd++;\n        let existing = fileStore.get(norm);\n        if (existing && !(flags & O_TRUNC)) {\n          fdTable.set(fd, { data: Buffer.from(existing.data), pos: (flags & O_APPEND) ? existing.data.length : 0, size: existing.data.length, path: norm, writable: true });\n        } else {\n          fdTable.set(fd, { data: Buffer.alloc(1024 * 1024 * 2), pos: 0, size: 0, path: norm, writable: true });\n        }\n        regs[2] = fd;\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Reading\n      const stored = fileStore.get(norm);\n      if (!stored) {\n        regs[2] = -2; // ENOENT\n        return;\n      }\n      const fd = nextFd++;\n      fdTable.set(fd, { data: stored.data, pos: 0, size: stored.data.length, path: norm, writable: false });\n      regs[2] = fd;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_CLOSE: { // close(fd)\n      const fd = a0;\n      const entry = fdTable.get(fd);\n      if (!entry) { regs[2] = -9; return; }\n      // If writable, save to fileStore and possibly to disk\n      if (entry.writable && entry.size > 0) {\n        const finalData = Buffer.from(entry.data.buffer, entry.data.byteOffset, entry.size);\n        fileStore.set(entry.path, { data: Buffer.from(finalData) });\n        // Save to real filesystem\n        saveToDisk(entry.path, finalData);\n      }\n      fdTable.delete(fd);\n      regs[2] = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_LSEEK: { // lseek(fd, offset, whence)\n      const fd = a0, offset = a1, whence = a2;\n      const entry = fdTable.get(fd);\n      if (!entry) { regs[2] = -9; return; }\n      if (whence === 0) entry.pos = offset; // SEEK_SET\n      else if (whence === 1) entry.pos += offset; // SEEK_CUR\n      else if (whence === 2) entry.pos = entry.size + offset; // SEEK_END\n      if (entry.pos < 0) entry.pos = 0;\n      regs[2] = entry.pos;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_FSYNC: { regs[2] = 0; return; }\n    case SYS_RENAME: {\n      const oldPath = normalizePath(readStr(a0 >>> 0));\n      const newPath = normalizePath(readStr(a1 >>> 0));\n      const d = fileStore.get(oldPath);\n      if (d) { fileStore.set(newPath, d); fileStore.delete(oldPath); }\n      regs[2] = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_MKDIR: { regs[2] = 0; return; }\n    case SYS_UNLINK: {\n      const p = normalizePath(readStr(a0 >>> 0));\n      fileStore.delete(p);\n      regs[2] = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_TIME: { // time(tloc)\n      const t = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);\n      if (a0 !== 0) w32(a0, t);\n      regs[2] = t;\n      return;\n    }\n    case SYS_EXIT: {\n      console.log('DOOM exited with code ' + a0);\n      process.exit(a0);\n    }\n    default: {\n      // Unknown syscall - return 0\n      regs[2] = 0;\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfunction saveToDisk(filePath, data) {\n  // Save files written by doom to the real filesystem\n  // Ensure parent directories exist\n  let realPath;\n  if (filePath.startsWith('tmp/')) {\n    realPath = '/' + filePath;\n  } else if (filePath.startsWith('/')) {\n    realPath = filePath;\n  } else {\n    realPath = path.join(__dirname, filePath);\n  }\n  const dir = path.dirname(realPath);\n  try { fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }); } catch(e) {}\n  try { fs.writeFileSync(realPath, data); } catch(e) {\n    // Try in current dir\n    try { fs.writeFileSync(path.join(__dirname, path.basename(filePath)), data); } catch(e2) {}\n  }\n}\n\n// FPU state\nconst fprBuf = new ArrayBuffer(128); // 32 * 4 bytes for 32 FPRs\nconst fprU32 = new Uint32Array(fprBuf);\nconst fprI32 = new Int32Array(fprBuf);\nconst fprF32 = new Float32Array(fprBuf);\nconst fprDV = new DataView(fprBuf);\nlet fcc = 0; // FPU condition code\n\nfunction getFPRdouble(reg) {\n  // Even register: low word, reg+1: high word\n  const lo = fprU32[reg & 0x1e];\n  const hi = fprU32[(reg & 0x1e) | 1];\n  const buf = Buffer.alloc(8);\n  buf.writeUInt32LE(lo, 0);\n  buf.writeUInt32LE(hi, 4);\n  return buf.readDoubleLE(0);\n}\nfunction setFPRdouble(reg, val) {\n  const buf = Buffer.alloc(8);\n  buf.writeDoubleLE(val, 0);\n  fprU32[reg & 0x1e] = buf.readUInt32LE(0);\n  fprU32[(reg & 0x1e) | 1] = buf.readUInt32LE(4);\n}\n\n// Main interpreter\nfunction run() {\n  initFiles();\n  const entry = loadELF(path.join(__dirname, 'doomgeneric_mips'));\n\n  // GPR: 32 registers, treat as signed 32-bit\n  const R = new Int32Array(32);\n  R[29] = STACK_TOP; // SP\n  R[28] = 0x00475000; // GP (approximate)\n\n  let pc = entry;\n  let hi = 0, lo = 0;\n  let delayPC = -1;\n  let steps = 0;\n  const MAX_STEPS = 5000000000;\n\n  while (steps < MAX_STEPS) {\n    const inst = ru32(pc);\n    if (inst === 0) { // NOP\n      if (delayPC !== -1) { pc = delayPC; delayPC = -1; } else { pc = (pc + 4) >>> 0; }\n      steps++;\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    const op = inst >>> 26;\n    let branchTarget = -1;\n\n    switch (op) {\n      case 0x00: { // SPECIAL\n        const funct = inst & 0x3f;\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const rd = (inst >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n        const sa = (inst >>> 6) & 0x1f;\n        switch (funct) {\n          case 0x00: // SLL\n            R[rd] = (R[rt] << sa) | 0; break;\n          case 0x02: // SRL / ROTR\n            if (rs & 1) { // ROTR\n              R[rd] = ((R[rt] >>> sa) | (R[rt] << (32 - sa))) | 0;\n            } else {\n              R[rd] = (R[rt] >>> sa) | 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          case 0x03: // SRA\n            R[rd] = (R[rt] >> sa) | 0; break;\n          case 0x04: // SLLV\n            R[rd] = (R[rt] << (R[rs] & 0x1f)) | 0; break;\n          case 0x06: // SRLV / ROTRV\n            if (sa & 1) { // ROTRV\n              const sh = R[rs] & 0x1f;\n              R[rd] = ((R[rt] >>> sh) | (R[rt] << (32 - sh))) | 0;\n            } else {\n              R[rd] = (R[rt] >>> (R[rs] & 0x1f)) | 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          case 0x07: // SRAV\n            R[rd] = (R[rt] >> (R[rs] & 0x1f)) | 0; break;\n          case 0x08: // JR\n            branchTarget = R[rs] >>> 0; break;\n          case 0x09: // JALR\n            branchTarget = R[rs] >>> 0;\n            R[rd] = (pc + 8) | 0;\n            break;\n          case 0x0a: // MOVZ\n            if (R[rt] === 0) R[rd] = R[rs]; break;\n          case 0x0b: // MOVN\n            if (R[rt] !== 0) R[rd] = R[rs]; break;\n          case 0x0c: // SYSCALL\n            handleSyscall(R);\n            break;\n          case 0x0d: // BREAK\n            break;\n          case 0x10: // MFHI\n            R[rd] = hi | 0; break;\n          case 0x11: // MTHI\n            hi = R[rs]; break;\n          case 0x12: // MFLO\n            R[rd] = lo | 0; break;\n          case 0x13: // MTLO\n            lo = R[rs]; break;\n          case 0x18: { // MULT\n            const a = BigInt(R[rs]);\n            const b = BigInt(R[rt]);\n            const result = a * b;\n            lo = Number(result & 0xFFFFFFFFn) | 0;\n            hi = Number((result >> 32n) & 0xFFFFFFFFn) | 0;\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x19: { // MULTU\n            const a = BigInt(R[rs] >>> 0);\n            const b = BigInt(R[rt] >>> 0);\n            const result = a * b;\n            lo = Number(result & 0xFFFFFFFFn) | 0;\n            hi = Number((result >> 32n) & 0xFFFFFFFFn) | 0;\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x1a: { // DIV\n            if (R[rt] !== 0) {\n              lo = (R[rs] / R[rt]) | 0;\n              hi = (R[rs] % R[rt]) | 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x1b: { // DIVU\n            const a = R[rs] >>> 0, b = R[rt] >>> 0;\n            if (b !== 0) {\n              lo = (a / b) >>> 0;\n              hi = (a % b) >>> 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x20: // ADD\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] + R[rt]) | 0; break;\n          case 0x21: // ADDU\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] + R[rt]) | 0; break;\n          case 0x22: // SUB\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] - R[rt]) | 0; break;\n          case 0x23: // SUBU\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] - R[rt]) | 0; break;\n          case 0x24: // AND\n            R[rd] = R[rs] & R[rt]; break;\n          case 0x25: // OR\n            R[rd] = R[rs] | R[rt]; break;\n          case 0x26: // XOR\n            R[rd] = R[rs] ^ R[rt]; break;\n          case 0x27: // NOR\n            R[rd] = ~(R[rs] | R[rt]); break;\n          case 0x2a: // SLT\n            R[rd] = (R[rs] < R[rt]) ? 1 : 0; break;\n          case 0x2b: // SLTU\n            R[rd] = ((R[rs] >>> 0) < (R[rt] >>> 0)) ? 1 : 0; break;\n          case 0x34: // TEQ\n            // Trap if equal - for divide by zero checks, just ignore\n            break;\n          default:\n            console.error('Unknown SPECIAL funct: 0x' + funct.toString(16) + ' at PC=0x' + pc.toString(16));\n            break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x01: { // REGIMM\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14; // sign-extended, *4\n        switch (rt) {\n          case 0x00: // BLTZ\n            if (R[rs] < 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n            break;\n          case 0x01: // BGEZ\n            if (R[rs] >= 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n            break;\n          case 0x10: // BLTZAL\n            R[31] = (pc + 8) | 0;\n            if (R[rs] < 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n            break;\n          case 0x11: // BGEZAL\n            R[31] = (pc + 8) | 0;\n            if (R[rs] >= 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n            break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x02: // J\n        branchTarget = (((pc + 4) & 0xf0000000) | ((inst & 0x03ffffff) << 2)) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      case 0x03: // JAL\n        R[31] = (pc + 8) | 0;\n        branchTarget = (((pc + 4) & 0xf0000000) | ((inst & 0x03ffffff) << 2)) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      case 0x04: { // BEQ\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14;\n        if (R[rs] === R[rt]) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x05: { // BNE\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14;\n        if (R[rs] !== R[rt]) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x06: { // BLEZ\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14;\n        if (R[rs] <= 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x07: { // BGTZ\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 14;\n        if (R[rs] > 0) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + imm) >>> 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x08: { // ADDI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = (R[rs] + imm) | 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x09: { // ADDIU\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = (R[rs] + imm) | 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0a: { // SLTI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = (R[rs] < imm) ? 1 : 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0b: { // SLTIU\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = ((R[rs] >>> 0) < (imm >>> 0)) ? 1 : 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0c: { // ANDI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = inst & 0xffff;\n        R[rt] = R[rs] & imm;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0d: { // ORI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = inst & 0xffff;\n        R[rt] = R[rs] | imm;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0e: { // XORI\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = inst & 0xffff;\n        R[rt] = R[rs] ^ imm;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x0f: { // LUI\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = inst & 0xffff;\n        R[rt] = (imm << 16) | 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x1c: { // SPECIAL2\n        const funct = inst & 0x3f;\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const rd = (inst >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n        switch (funct) {\n          case 0x02: // MUL\n            R[rd] = Math.imul(R[rs], R[rt]); break;\n          case 0x20: // CLZ\n            R[rd] = R[rs] === 0 ? 32 : Math.clz32(R[rs] >>> 0); break;\n          case 0x21: // CLO\n            R[rd] = Math.clz32(~R[rs] >>> 0); break;\n          default: break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x1f: { // SPECIAL3\n        const funct = inst & 0x3f;\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const rd = (inst >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n        const sa = (inst >>> 6) & 0x1f;\n        switch (funct) {\n          case 0x00: { // EXT - extract bit field\n            const pos = sa;\n            const size = rd + 1;\n            R[rt] = (R[rs] >>> pos) & ((1 << size) - 1);\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x04: { // INS - insert bit field\n            const pos = sa;\n            const size = rd - pos + 1;\n            const mask = ((1 << size) - 1) << pos;\n            R[rt] = (R[rt] & ~mask) | ((R[rs] << pos) & mask);\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x20: { // BSHFL\n            switch (sa) {\n              case 0x02: // WSBH - word swap bytes within halfwords\n                R[rd] = (((R[rt] & 0xff00ff00) >>> 8) | ((R[rt] & 0x00ff00ff) << 8)) | 0;\n                break;\n              case 0x10: // SEB - sign extend byte\n                R[rd] = (R[rt] << 24) >> 24; break;\n              case 0x18: // SEH - sign extend halfword\n                R[rd] = (R[rt] << 16) >> 16; break;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          default: break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x11: { // COP1 (FPU)\n        const fmt = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f;\n        const ft = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const fs_ = (inst >>> 11) & 0x1f;\n        const fd = (inst >>> 6) & 0x1f;\n        const cfunct = inst & 0x3f;\n        switch (fmt) {\n          case 0x00: // MFC1\n            R[ft] = fprI32[fs_]; break;\n          case 0x04: // MTC1\n            fprI32[fs_] = R[ft]; break;\n          case 0x03: // MFHC1\n            R[ft] = fprI32[fs_ | 1]; break;\n          case 0x07: // MTHC1\n            fprI32[fs_ | 1] = R[ft]; break;\n          case 0x08: // BC1\n            if (ft & 1) { // BC1T\n              if (fcc) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + ((inst << 16) >> 14)) >>> 0;\n            } else { // BC1F\n              if (!fcc) branchTarget = ((pc + 4) + ((inst << 16) >> 14)) >>> 0;\n            }\n            break;\n          case 0x10: { // S (single precision)\n            const a = fprF32[fs_], b = fprF32[ft];\n            switch (cfunct) {\n              case 0x00: fprF32[fd] = a + b; break; // ADD.S\n              case 0x01: fprF32[fd] = a - b; break; // SUB.S\n              case 0x02: fprF32[fd] = a * b; break; // MUL.S\n              case 0x03: fprF32[fd] = a / b; break; // DIV.S\n              case 0x06: fprF32[fd] = a; break; // MOV.S\n              case 0x07: fprF32[fd] = -a; break; // NEG.S\n              case 0x0d: fprI32[fd] = Math.trunc(a); break; // TRUNC.W.S\n              case 0x21: setFPRdouble(fd, a); break; // CVT.D.S\n              case 0x11: if (fcc) fprF32[fd] = fprF32[fs_]; break; // MOVT.S\n              case 0x34: fcc = (a < b) ? 1 : 0; break; // C.OLT.S\n              default: break;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x11: { // D (double precision)\n            const a = getFPRdouble(fs_), b = getFPRdouble(ft);\n            switch (cfunct) {\n              case 0x00: setFPRdouble(fd, a + b); break; // ADD.D\n              case 0x01: setFPRdouble(fd, a - b); break; // SUB.D\n              case 0x02: setFPRdouble(fd, a * b); break; // MUL.D\n              case 0x03: setFPRdouble(fd, a / b); break; // DIV.D\n              case 0x06: setFPRdouble(fd, a); break; // MOV.D\n              case 0x07: setFPRdouble(fd, -a); break; // NEG.D\n              case 0x11: if (fcc) setFPRdouble(fd, getFPRdouble(fs_)); break; // MOVT.D\n              case 0x34: fcc = (a < b) ? 1 : 0; break; // C.OLT.D\n              default: break;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          case 0x14: { // W (word - integer in FPR)\n            switch (cfunct) {\n              case 0x20: fprF32[fd] = fprI32[fs_]; break; // CVT.S.W\n              case 0x21: setFPRdouble(fd, fprI32[fs_]); break; // CVT.D.W\n              default: break;\n            }\n            break;\n          }\n          default: break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x20: { // LB\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = r8((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x21: { // LH\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = r16((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x22: { // LWL\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        const addr = (R[rs] + imm) >>> 0;\n        const aligned = addr & ~3;\n        const byte_ = addr & 3;\n        const mem = ru32(aligned);\n        switch (byte_) {\n          case 0: R[rt] = (R[rt] & 0x00ffffff) | ((mem & 0xff) << 24); break;\n          case 1: R[rt] = (R[rt] & 0x0000ffff) | ((mem & 0xffff) << 16); break;\n          case 2: R[rt] = (R[rt] & 0x000000ff) | ((mem & 0xffffff) << 8); break;\n          case 3: R[rt] = mem; break;\n        }\n        R[rt] = R[rt] | 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x23: { // LW\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = r32((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x24: { // LBU\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = ru8((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x25: { // LHU\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        R[rt] = ru16((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x26: { // LWR\n = addr & 3;\n        const mem = ru32(aligned);\n        switch (byte_) {\n          case 0: R[rt] = mem; break;\n          case 1: R[rt] = (R[rt] & 0xff000000) | ((mem >>> 8) & 0x00ffffff); break;\n R[rt] | 0;\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x28: { // SB\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        w8((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0, R[rt]);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x29: { // SH\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        w16((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0, R[rt]);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x2a: { // SWL\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        const addr = (R[rs] + imm) >>> 0;\n        const aligned = addr & ~3;\n        const byte_ = addr & 3;\n        const mem = ru32(aligned);\n        const val = R[rt] >>> 0;\n        switch (byte_) {\n          case 0: w32(aligned, (mem & 0xffffff00) | (val >>> 24)); break;\n          case 1: w32(aligned, (mem & 0xffff0000) | (val >>> 16)); break;\n          case 2: w32(aligned, (mem & 0xff000000) | (val >>> 8)); break;\n          case 3: w32(aligned, val); break;\n        }\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x2b: { // SW\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n        const imm = (inst << 16) >> 16;\n        w32((R[rs] + imm) >>> 0, R[rt]);\n        break;\n      }\n      case 0x2e: { // SWR\n        const rs = (inst >>> 21) & 0x1f, rt = (inst >>> 16) & 0x1f;\n I'm looking at the byte layout in the BMP file—when the 32-bit pixel value 0xAARRGGBB is stored in little-endian format, it becomes four bytes: BB, GG, RR, AA. PIL reads this as BGRA, so it should correctly interpret each byte as blue, green, red, and alpha respectively.\n\nBut there's a mismatch: the first pixel has bytes 01 01 74 00, which should give R=0x74, G=0x01, B=0x01, A=0x00, yet PIL is reporting R=1, G=1, B=116, A=0. Also, the alpha channel being 0 throughout makes sense since DOOM doesn't use transparency—it just writes RGB values with zero alpha. I'm seeing the actual pixel values at different coordinates—grays, blues, and greens that match what I'd expect from a DOOM title screen. The real problem is that PIL is reading the BMP format incorrectly since BMP stores pixels as BGRA but PIL interprets them as RGBA, swapping the red and blue channels.
